recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Philadelphia
recommendations.overview: Two competing lawyers join forces to sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination. As their unlikely friendship develops, their courage overcomes the prejudice and corruption of their powerful adversaries.

recommendations.title: To the Top
recommendations.overview: Scott, a gifted young snowboarder, has one dream: to be number one. He wants to do what no one has ever succeeded in doing: to climb Mount Everest and ride the world's purest, steepest, and most dangerous descent. Once in Chamonix, the riders' Mecca,

recommendations.title: Le Havre
recommendations.overview: In the French harbor city of Le Havre, an elderly shoeshiner with an ailing wife crosses paths with a young African refugee pursued by the police for deportation.

recommendations.title: White Fang
recommendations.overview: Jack London's classic adventure story about the friendship developed between a Yukon gold hunter and the mixed dog-wolf he rescues from the hands of a man who mistreats him.

recommendations.title: The Breaker Upperers
recommendations.overview: Two women run a business breaking up couples for cash but when one develops a conscience their friendship unravels.

recommendations.title: Woman of the Hour
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer in '70s LA when they're cast on an episode of "The Dating Game."

recommendations.title: Hostiles
recommendations.overview: A legendary Native American-hating Army captain nearing retirement in 1892 is given one last assignment: to escort a Cheyenne chief and his family through dangerous territory back to his Montana reservation.

recommendations.title: The Monk and the Gun
recommendations.overview: An American travels to Bhutan searching for a valuable antique rifle and crosses paths with a young monk who wanders through the serene mountains, instructed by his teacher to make things right again.

recommendations.title: The Road Within
recommendations.overview: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.
